Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_IN_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}You know you're gonna need my help. We good to go?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_IN_AFTE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Alright, let's do this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_OVER_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}Yo, what gives? You already got a full team![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_CHANGE_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}So who am I gonna switch with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_CHANGE_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}So who am I gonna switch with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_OUT_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}Dude, what!? I'm not just dead weight... Right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_OVER_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}The team's already full, man.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TUTORIAL_BEFO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'll prove that I should be in charge![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_THEURGIA_BEFO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'll hold things down here, so go give 'em hell![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_CHANGE_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}You want me to switch with someone?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_IN_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2117 0 0}Alright... You ready to get this show on the road?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}You're lookin' at your ace in the hole![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_OUT_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Just leave it all to me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_IN_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Tch... If he was so smart, why didn't he do something more useful with his life?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_OUT_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, no point thinkin' about it too much... Let's go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_IN_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2129 0 0}That asshole's up next, right? Mind letting me come with?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}I got some unfinished business with him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_OUT_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2129 0 0}I guess it's not like beating the shit outta him will suddenly fix everything, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}Anyways, we gotta get past him either way. You ready to do this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_IN_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2117 0 0}Alright, now it's time for the real battle...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Let's end this with a bang![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_OUT_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Your cleanup hitter, Junpei Iori, is gonna knock it outta the park![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_IN_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Alright, let's get going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_OUT_06
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Somethin' up? C'mon, let's go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_IN_06
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2129 0 0}The hell was up with them? Poppin' in to preach all high and mighty just to hightail it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}You bastards think we're scared of bein' locked up!? ...Whatever. Let's do this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_OVER_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}C'mon, man... You got a full party already![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_CHANGE_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}So who do I switch with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_IN_07
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2129 0 0}This'll be my first time goin' to a place like this, y'know? Man, I'm gettin' butterflies...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_IN_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2118 0 0}We're so close... Let's kick some ass, man.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, am I gonna be in the starting lineup?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_IN_09
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}I wonder what Amada and Aragaki-san are up to...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}Wait, you think this is their way of saying they're leaving things in my capable hands...? Dude...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_IN_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}Alright, this is my time to shine! I'll take us all the way home, baby![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_OUT_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm ready to step up to the plate! Let's get this done![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_OUT_AFT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Okay, fine... But you better not lose, alright?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_OVER_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Dude, there's no more room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_CHANGE_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Who do I swap spots with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_PARTY_OUT_TKJ
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2129 0 0}I'm not gonna let them have their way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}But hey, uh, you're not gonna bench me, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0425_0508_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}I don't care where those enemies come from. I'll smash 'em down one right after another![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}You can count on me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0510_0514_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}That stuff that happened on the monorail was friggin' crazy, man.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I kinda wanna make it into like a script for a TV show or something, but I probably can't...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sucks... I bet it woulda been kickass, too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0523_JUNPEI_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm glad I finally have a rival that can stand up to my good looks![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0602_0605_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2066 0 0}Junpei's Believe It, or Don't is a smash hit! Its rise into continued popularity knows no bounds![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Even in the blistering heat of summer, Junpei's Believe It, or Don't will make you shiver in fear![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0606_0607_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}That guy who saved us, Aragaki-san, was real tough, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}He took that dude down with a single headbutt! I don't care who you are; that's just badass.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0613_JUNPEI_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2132 0 0}Kirijo-senpai's beautiful fencing, and Fuuka's soothing voice...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Truly an oasis in the desert![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0623_0707_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}Ta-dah da-daah! Junpei has leveled up![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}...I wish I could say that like a hundred times a day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}The more I level up, the more awesome I get![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0709_0717_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2011 0 0}...What? NOW you need somethin' from me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0718_JUNPEI_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2088 0 0}Dude, I'm so pumped for Yakushima![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm thinkin' about it so much, even Tartarus is starting to look like the beach to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0724_JUNPEI_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}She's so cute, but she can also shoot bullets from her fingers![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a good thing she's on our side... It'd suck to have her as an enemy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0725_0805_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}But don't you think Yuka-tan's giving him too much credit?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}It'd be nice if she praised me like that once in a while...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0806_0809_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2111 0 0}I seriously can't believe we have to go to summer school![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe if I just stay in Tartarus, I won't have to go...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0810_0820_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2066 0 0}Now that Koromaru's on our side, things are gonna be better than ever![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}With so many team members, Tartarus is gonna be a lot funner! ...I hope.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0821_0827_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, at least I can still make some beautiful memories here in Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}...Like anyone could do that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0828_0902_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Amada's just in elementary school, but he's so determined. It's kind of amazing, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0903_0904_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}Aragaki-san is our senpai in school and in SEES... Oh, and in Personas! He's like a triple senpai![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}If he asked me to go buy him some yakisoba pan, there's no way I could turn him down...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}But what if he asks me to in here? I mean, there's no yakisoba pan in Tartarus![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0906_0918_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Since I began talking to Chidori, I've been thinking a lot...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Ya know... I've never really thought that deeply about things like life and death and stuff...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0919_1003_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2129 0 0}Those dudes from Strega are prolly gonna come out during the next full moon, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}I can't lose... for me, or for Chidori...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1005_1016_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2093 0 0}There's no way I could accept my death so easily like that...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Aragaki-san is amazing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1019_1102_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2004 0 0}When Tartarus disappears, the first thing I'm gonna do is go see Chidori.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Haha, kinda makes me feel like I'm a hero in a video game or somethin'.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}"Then, I will check up on the fair maiden after I have defeated the final enemy!" Heheh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1106_1109_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2004 0 0}So Ikutsuki was playin' us the whole time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}The more I think about it, the more I hate Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1110_1117_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2004 0 0}Dude, Kirijo-senpai looks pretty rough... It's like there's no life in her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I don't blame her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}If I lost someone close to me, I'd probably be like that, too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1121_JUNPEI_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2111 0 0}Man, I'm still sore... Kirijo-senpai didn't have to go that far with her "execution."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}After that, we shouldn't even be here tonight. We're working too hard...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1121_JUNPEI_DUNGE_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}I wonder if something happened to Kirijo-senpai on the school trip.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, she was so depressed, but she seems fine all of a sudden.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Well, I'm glad she's okay, at least.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1122_1127_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}And it's not just my own now. I have to take care of it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1203_1213_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2129 0 0}Ryoji dropped a real bomb on us, didn't he?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}The world is ending? How can I just accept that!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0101_0114_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2066 0 0}Ai-chan is different now. I dunno, it's like... her face seems brighter, or somethin'.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, I haven't stopped growing yet, either! I'm still gonna level up like crazy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0115_0130_JUNPEI_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2086 0 0}It's the top of the final inning![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Let's fight and level up and blast Nyx into outer space![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0131_JUNPEI_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Man, I guess this is the last night we'll be calling you "Leader," huh, {f 4 2}?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Kinda hard to call you that outside of Tartarus. We'd get a lot of weird looks at school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, I guess we'll just have to come up with a new nickname to call ya starting tomorrow![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TEST_JUNPEI_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2102 0 0}Don't say anything about exams![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}I don't wanna think about 'em while I'm in Tartarus![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HANYOU1_JUNPEI_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}Tartarus... Tartarus... Tartar sauce...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, crap... I want some deep-fried shrimp to munch on now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HANYOU2_JUNPEI_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}I wish there was a convenience store inside Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}They could have all kinds of stuff, and we wouldn't have to worry about going hungry![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I wish the Kirijo Group would really make one here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_ZEKKOCHO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2088 0 0}Come on out, Shadows... Don't worry, I won't bite...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'll just chop you up into itty-bitty pieces![n]{f 1 1}
